summary: Automation Intelligence Features - All 4 new features fully functional. 35 backend API tests pass. Frontend UI verified: AutomationMetricsCard on dashboard, DecisionExplainabilityPanel and ReviewerAssistPanel on document detail page. No regressions on readiness endpoints.
seed_data_creation: Used existing document 1acf983b-a65b-423a-bfcd-8e0ee63fd25d for review-assist testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 Automation Intelligence features verified: (1) GET /api/automation/metrics returns total_documents, automation_rate, review_rate, blocked_rate, avg_confidence, confidence_distribution, signal_averages, top_review_causes, top_blocking_reasons, thresholds. (2) POST /api/automation/batch-evaluate processes documents and returns total/processed/errors. (3) GET /api/documents/{id}/decision-explanation returns decision, confidence, status, signals, supporting_evidence, risk_flags. (4) GET /api/documents/{id}/automation-confidence returns score, signals dict, weights, thresholds, recommended_action. (5) POST /api/documents/{id}/review-assist returns suggested_actions array with action, field, suggested_value, confidence, reason. (6) Non-existent docs return 404. (7) No regression: GET /api/readiness/metrics and GET /api/dashboard/workflow-intelligence still include readiness_summary.

response_fields: signal_averages (vendor:0.38, entity:0, extraction:0.72, graph:0.16, policy:0.41, duplicate_risk:0.009)
suggested_actions (3 suggestions for test doc: resolve_vendor, correct invoice_number, correct total_amount)
